headline: While One Farm Owner Turned Down $26M From an AI Data Center Developer, Another Couple Sold Their Struggling Farm for $22M
summary: As artificial intelligence fuels a massive data center construction boom across America, some landowners are cashing in on life-changing offers while others are refusing to sell at any price. That contrast was on full display in Kentucky and Pennsylvania. In...
